properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 25/15
NORWEGIAN SEA

ONE SCIENTIFIC ROCKET WILL BE LAUNCHED FROM 
ANDOYA SPACE CENTER IN THE TIME PERIOD FROM 
23TH MARCH 2015 TO 1ST APRIL 2015. THE LAUNCH 
WILL BE CONDUCTED BETWEEN 17:00 HRS AND 
24:00 HRS LOCAL TIME, WITHIN THE ANNOUNCED PERIOD. 
SEAGOING TRAFFIC IS REQUESTED TO BE AWARE OF 
THE FOLLOWING TWO HAZARD AREAS:

HAZARD AREA 1 (INNER HAZARD AREA):
A SECTOR WITH ORIGIN IN THE LAUNCHER 
COORDINATES 69-17.6N - 016-01.1E
TRUE BEARING: 300° – 020°.
SECTOR LENGTH: 3 NAUTICAL MILES

HAZARD AREA 2 (OUTER HAZARD AREA): AN AREA 
WITHIN THE FOLLOWING COORDINATES:
1. 70-42.0N - 015-00.0E
2. 70-36.0N - 009-30.0E
3. 72-00.0N - 007-00.0E
4. 73-00.0N - 008-00.0E
5. 73-42.0N - 015-00.0E
6. 73-12.0E - 018-00.0E
7. 71-18.0N - 018-30.0E
8. 70-42.0N - 015-00.0E

NORWEGIAN NOTICE TO MARINERS 04/15 REEFERS.
